successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.validation.ts exists and exports createLeaveSchema that validates leaveTypeId as UUID, startDate and endDate as valid dates (YYYY-MM-DD format and actual calendar date) with startDate <= endDate, and optional reason.

constraints: Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing (golden principle)
Schemas must be exported from src/modules/leave/leave.validation.ts
All ID fields must be validated as UUIDs
Date fields must be validated as YYYY-MM-DD format and actual calendar dates
outOfScope: Any other files in src/modules/leave/ beyond leave.validation.ts
Implementation of leave request lifecycle logic
Writing unit tests for the schemas (testing is separate)
